criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on popular app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app screenshots

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates, indicating ongoing development and support.
criteria.sources: App store update history, official app blogs

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Level of privacy and security features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, privacy policies, security reviews
